title: Fold Where into the following LINQ operator
summary: Operators such as Any, Count, First, and Single accept a predicate directly. Calling Where immediately before a parameterless one of them creates an extra iterator for no benefit and reads as two steps where one would do.
Pass the predicate to the terminal operator and drop the Where call.
messageFormat: Move this predicate into the following operator and remove the redundant 'Where' call.
